steps.title: Use the contrast
steps.content: "On the other hand" contrasts a damaged viburnum plant with one that has smooth surfaces and uniformly green leaves. The blank must describe a plant without the damage symptoms just mentioned.

steps.title: Name the plant condition
steps.content: A would still describe a plant facing difficulty, B means helpful and does not describe the plant's condition, and C means uncomplicated. The word that fits an undamaged plant with normal leaves is "healthy." The answer is D.
